banknotes.obverse_info:
112ft Schooner "Ernestina" 
  (built 1894 as "Efﬁe M. Morrissey"; 1948 sold to Cape Verde; 1982 donated by 
  the government of Cape Verde to the USA as a symbol of cooperation between the 
  two governments.)
banknotes.reverse_info:
De Havilland DHC-6-300 (Callsign 
    D4-CAX; built 1977) of Cabo Verde Airlines on Ilha do Sal (Amilcar Cabral) 
    International Airport
    Crashed on San Francisco Mendes International Airport (Praia) 
    on 28.09.1998. On Board: 3 crew, 19 passengers (among them also Prime 
    Minister Carlos Veiga).
    One passenger died (bodyguard of Veiga). The aircraft was a total loss.
